purpose: Predicts labor market outcomes based on the ratio of AI-augmented to AI-substituted tasks
components: Ratio >1.5:1 → net employment gains within 10 years
Time-varying: ratio may decline as agent capabilities mature
current_assessment: AI sits in the historically ambiguous zone at 1.0-1.3:1. More a monitoring framework than a confident prediction. The time-varying nature (ratio declining as capabilities improve) is an important non-obvious consideration.
limitations: Depends heavily on survey data of uncertain quality
Ratio is time-varying and may shift rapidly with capability improvements
Does not distinguish within-sector from across-sector effects
